body.docName: 医招智付配送明细绑定标签
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/distribution-detail/bind-tag 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/distribution-detail/bind-tag 
 ## 接口描述 
**接口功能：**
医招智付-集采平台-自动入库模块，用于给药品配送明细绑定自定义标签，比如：临期药品、散装药品等；
**接口设计：**
* 批量接口，配送明细最大不超过100条，允许部分成功，部分失败。
* 每条配送明细可以绑定多个标签，最大不超过10个。
* 一次报文请求中配送明细不可重复。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"distributionCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22S2025112700001%22","desc":"%20%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"64"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"tagInfoList","required":true,"label":"%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22000001%22%2C%2200002%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BB%A3%E8%A1%A8%E4%B8%80%E7%A7%8D%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%EF%BC%8C%E6%AF%94%E5%A6%82%22%E4%B8%B4%E6%9C%9F%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%22%E7%AD%89%0A%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E6%9C%80%E9%95%BF32%E4%BD%8D%E3%80%82%0A%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%B7%AF%E5%BE%84%3A%20%E5%8C%BB%E6%8B%9B%E6%99%BA%E4%BB%98-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0-%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99-%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93-%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE","maxLength":"10"},"children":[]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数

## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
[
    {
        "distributionCode": "S2025112700001",
        "tagInfoList": [
            "000001",
            "000002"
        ]
    }
]
```
### 响应报文
全部成功
```json
{
    "body": [],
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true
}
```

部分成功
```json
{
    "body": [
        {
            "distributeCode": "S13520251217000032",
            "errorMessage": "配送明细不存在;"
        },
        {
            "distributeCode": "S1352025121700002",
            "errorMessage": "标签25039216020不存在或未启用;"
        }
    ],
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true
}
```

全部失败
```json
{
    "body": [
        {
            "distributeCode": "S13520251217000032",
            "errorMessage": "配送明细不存在;"
        }
    ],
    "returnCode": "E0002",
    "success": false
}
```

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/distribution-detail/bind-tag

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/distribution-detail/bind-tag

接口描述

接口功能： 医招智付-集采平台-自动入库模块，用于给药品配送明细绑定自定义标签，比如：临期药品、散装药品等； 接口设计：

  • 批量接口，配送明细最大不超过100条，允许部分成功，部分失败。
  • 每条配送明细可以绑定多个标签，最大不超过10个。
  • 一次报文请求中配送明细不可重复。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"distributionCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22S2025112700001%22","desc":"%20%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"64"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"tagInfoList","required":true,"label":"%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22000001%22%2C%2200002%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BB%A3%E8%A1%A8%E4%B8%80%E7%A7%8D%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%EF%BC%8C%E6%AF%94%E5%A6%82%22%E4%B8%B4%E6%9C%9F%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%22%E7%AD%89%0A%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E6%9C%80%E9%95%BF32%E4%BD%8D%E3%80%82%0A%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%B7%AF%E5%BE%84%3A%20%E5%8C%BB%E6%8B%9B%E6%99%BA%E4%BB%98-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0-%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99-%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93-%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE","maxLength":"10"},"children":[]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}
